raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> boyfriend at the time opened up an AMEX card in my name as the primary account holder. Set it all up payment email phone number to himself yet it was in my name spent {$100000.00} over the year and a half added my cable bill as a reoccurring charge. Used it to run his trucking company. Amex says I am responsible for the bill that is now XXXX claiming I benefited from the bill. Even telling Amex its was identity theft they continue to leave the card open and he continued to use it on monthly bills. Found out he is a serial scammer on XXXX  for the same exact stuff
